examples: Amsterdam is de hoofdstad van Nederland.
Nederland is a place to relax. The area is disconcertingly quiet.
In 1987 the Dutch Nunchaku Foundation (SNN, Stichting Nunchaku Nederland) was founded.
The 1, 400-person town of Nederland gained worldwide notoriety in 1994 when local authorities discovered the body of Norwegian Bredo Morstoel packed in a steel coffin filled with dry ice.
